claims.text: Reinforcement learning agents often exhibit unstable or degraded performance when deployed in environments subject to unexpected external disturbances and model uncertainties.
claims.source_quote: RL agents often exhibit unstable or degraded performance when deployed in environments subject to unexpected external disturbances and model uncertainties.

claims.text: The proposed MMDDPG framework formulates the training process as a minimax optimization problem between a user policy and an adversarial disturbance policy.
claims.source_quote: The training process is formulated as a minimax optimization problem between a user policy and an adversarial disturbance policy.

claims.text: In the MMDDPG minimax optimization, the user learns a robust policy that minimizes the objective function while the adversary generates disturbances that maximize it.
claims.source_quote: In this problem, the user learns a robust policy that minimizes the objective function, while the adversary generates disturbances that maximize it.

claims.text: MMDDPG introduces a fractional objective that balances task performance and disturbance magnitude.
claims.source_quote: we introduce a fractional objective that balances task performance and disturbance magnitude.

claims.text: The fractional objective in MMDDPG prevents excessively aggressive disturbances.
claims.source_quote: This objective prevents excessively aggressive disturbances and promotes robust learning.

claims.text: The fractional objective in MMDDPG promotes robust learning.
claims.source_quote: This objective prevents excessively aggressive disturbances and promotes robust learning.

claims.text: MMDDPG was experimentally evaluated in MuJoCo environments.
claims.source_quote: Experimental evaluations in MuJoCo environments demonstrate that the proposed MMDDPG achieves significantly improved robustness against both external force perturbations and model parameter variations.

claims.text: MMDDPG achieves significantly improved robustness against external force perturbations compared to baseline methods.
claims.source_quote: the proposed MMDDPG achieves significantly improved robustness against both external force perturbations and model parameter variations.

claims.text: MMDDPG achieves significantly improved robustness against model parameter variations compared to baseline methods.
claims.source_quote: the proposed MMDDPG achieves significantly improved robustness against both external force perturbations and model parameter variations.

claims.text: MMDDPG is based on the deep deterministic policy gradient algorithm.
claims.source_quote: we propose minimax deep deterministic policy gradient (MMDDPG), a framework for learning disturbance-resilient policies in continuous control tasks.

claims.text: MMDDPG is designed for continuous control tasks.
claims.source_quote: we propose minimax deep deterministic policy gradient (MMDDPG), a framework for learning disturbance-resilient policies in continuous control tasks.
